threats.title: Ivanti, Fortinet, and SAP Release Patches for Multiple Critical Vulnerabilities
threats.summary: Fortinet, Ivanti, and SAP have released security updates to address multiple critical security vulnerabilities that could result in arbitrary code execution and information disclosure. The security flaw patched by Fortinet relates to a command injection vulnerability in FortiSandbox, FortiSandbox Cloud, and FortiSandbox PaaS WEB UI. It's tracked as CVE-2026-25089 (CVSS score: 9.1). threats.title: Unpatched Langflow Flaw CVE-2026-5027 Exploited for Unauthenticated RCE

threats.title: Your Automated Pentest Looks Clean. See What It Missed in This Expert Webinar
threats.summary: Your pentest report looks clean. That might be the problem. Run automated pentesting long enough, and the new findings start to dry up. threats.title: Who Runs the Ransomware Group ‘The Gentlemen?’
threats.summary: A cybercrime group known as The Gentlemen has emerged as the second most active ransomware gang by victim count, rapidly attracting a talented pool of hackers through an aggressive recruitment strategy that promises affiliates 90 percent of any ransom paid by victims. This post examines clues pointing to a real life identity for the administrator of The Gentlemen ransomware group.
